/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_project__rosidl_generator_c.so -o librover_project__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_project/msg/detail/proximity__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_project/msg/detail/gps_fix__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_project/msg/detail/imu_orientation__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_project/msg/detail/nav_goal__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_project/msg/detail/waypoint_list__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
